title: 30pcs Large Organza Christmas Pull Bows for Gift Wrapping, 50mm Silver Grey Pulled Bow Ribbons Gift Bows for Present Wedding Car Gift Baskets
features: HIGH QUALITY: Dishaur big pulled bow is made of organza and plastics with bright colors, not easy to break, which are also non-fading. The pure color combined with the organza fabric design makes it more fashionable

EASY TO USE: Just pull the two inner ribbons and push the outer ribbon at the same time, then you will get a beautiful bow in a second. Very easy to assemble and do not waste your time. You can even flatten the bow and reuse it.
SIZE: The unformed present wrapping pull bow measures 79cm / 31.1 inch long 50mm / 2 inch width; After forming, the diameter of the gift bow is 15 cm/6 inches

MULTI-FUNCTIONS: Perfect for gift wraping, wedding baskets, wine bottles, Christmas and car decors, you can use them to decorate your party, wedding ceremony, festivals and etc, making your important day full of romantic and beautiful feeling
PACKAGE INCLUDED: Comes with 30 pack large organza pull bows, enough quantity for you to meet your demands to decoration your gifts, cars, or wedding baskets, etc..
description: Product Description PRODUCT SIZE The unformed present wrapping pull bow measures 79cm / 31.1 inch long 50mm / 2 inch width; After forming, the diameter of the gift bow is 15 cm/6 inches Note: Because the formed pull bow is very easy to broken and not convenient to intransit , so we sell it in unformed appearence HOW TO USE 1. Find the two inner ribbons in the middle of the pull bow buttom 2. Just pull the two inner ribbons and push the outer ribbon at the same time 3. Then you will get a beautiful bow in a second 4.
